---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tile, section, or behavior faithful to apple.com
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The idea

**What:** (the tile, section, nav item, or behavior you want added)

**Where it fits:** (which part of the page)

**Why:** (what it improves or what on apple.com it mirrors)

**Reference:** (link to the apple.com page or the relevant part, if any)
